memoryArtifacts.headline: Thomas Hartshorn -- brief background
memoryArtifacts.description:
Thomas HARTSHORN was born about 1614 in England, deposing 3 Apr 1654 that he was age 40. 
He was married to Susanna BUCK in 1640 in Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts.

He signed a will on 26 Oct 1681 …

popularStory.headline: Thomas Hartshorn -- brief background
popularStory.description:
Thomas HARTSHORN was born about 1614 in England, deposing 3 Apr 1654 that he was age 40. 
He was married to Susanna BUCK in 1640 in Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts.

He signed a will on 26 Oct 1681 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Hartshorne於1614年5月18日出生在英國德比夏爾德比時，他的父親James Hartshorne29歲，母親Anne Gifford25歲。他於大約1640年與Susanna Buck在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可雷亞丁結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1683年5月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可雷亞丁享年69歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可雷亞丁。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Hartshorne于1614年5月18日出生在英国德比夏爾德比时，他的父亲James Hartshorne29岁，母亲Anne Gifford25岁。他于大约1640年与Susanna Buck在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可雷亞丁结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1683年5月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可雷亞丁享年69岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可雷亞丁。

nameMeanings.name: Hartshorne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Shropshire): variant of   Hartshorn  .

variants.name: Hartshorn
meanings: English: habitational name from Hartshorne (Derbyshire), from Old English heort ‘hart, stag’ (genitive heortes) + horn ‘horn’, perhaps in reference to the nearby hill (known as Hart Hill) and its supposed resemblance to a hart's horn. Alternatively, the name may be topographic, from Middle English harteshorn ‘swine cress’, for someone who lived at or near an area where swine cress grew.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Hartshorne was born on 18 May 1614, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, his father, James Hartshorne, was 29 and his mother, Anne Gifford, was 25. He married Susanna Buck about 1640, in Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 18 May 1683, in Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 69, and was buried in Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Hartshorne est né le 18 mai 1614, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, James Hartshorne, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Anne Gifford, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Susanna Buck environ 1640, à Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 mai 1683, à Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Hartshorne am 18. Mai 1614 in Derby, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Hartshorne 29 und seine Mutter Anne Gifford 25. Er hat um 1640 in Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Susanna Buck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. Mai 1683 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Hartshorne è nato il il 18 maggio 1614 nel Derby, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, James Hartshorne, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Anne Gifford, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Susanna Buck circa 1640, nel Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 maggio 1683, nel Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Hartshorneが1614年5月18日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーで生まれた時，父James Hartshorneは29歳，母Anne Giffordは25歳であった。約1640年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスレアディングでSusanna Buckと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1683年5月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスレアディングで69歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスレアディングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Hartshorne(이)가 1614년 5월 18일 영국 더비실르 더비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Hartshorne(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Gifford(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1640년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 리딩에서 Susanna Buck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1683년 5월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 리딩에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 리딩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Hartshorne nasceu em 18 de maio de 1614, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Hartshorne, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Anne Gifford, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Susanna Buck aproximadamente 1640, em Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 18 de maio de 1683, em Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Hartshorne родился 18 мая 1614 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени James Hartshorne было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Gifford, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Susanna Buck около 1640 г. в местности ридинг, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 18 мая 1683 г. в местности ридинг, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности ридинг, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Hartshorne nació el 18 de mayo de 1614, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, James Hartshorne, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Anne Gifford, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Susanna Buck aproximadamente 1640, en Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de mayo de 1683, en Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
